seoTitle: Felixstow vs Field — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Felixstow and Field. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Felixstow and Field.
heading: Felixstow vs Field — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Felixstow, South Australia and Field, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Felixstow has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Field (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Felixstow or Field safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Felixstow has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Field scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Felixstow scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Field scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Felixstow or Field?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Felixstow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
